---
title: "Part II: Agricultural Finance"
---

## Overview

Part II develops the financial tools needed to analyze agricultural decisions.

Topics include financial institutions, time value of money, annuities, agricultural accounting, financial ratios, investment appraisal, futures hedging, basis risk, agricultural insurance design, and research applications.

## Lectures

7. Introduction to Agricultural Finance
8. Financial Institutions and Intermediation
9. Time Value of Money I
10. Time Value of Money II
11. Agricultural Accounting
12. Financial Ratio Analysis
13. Investment Appraisal
14. Futures, Hedging, and Basis Risk
15. Agricultural Insurance Design
16. Project and Research Application
